channel.title: Aviation on Kayra Sari
channel.description: Recent content in Aviation on Kayra Sari

item.title: ETOPS: How Twin-Engine Jets Earned the Right to Fly Oceans
item.description: A comprehensive technical examination of Extended-range Twin-engine Operational Performance Standards — tracing the regulatory evolution from the 60-minute rule to ETOPS-370, the engineering requirements that underpin approval, and the future of overwater operations in an era of ultra-long-range twinjets.

item.title: E6B Flight Computer
item.description: A browser-based digital flight computer modeled after the classic E6B circular slide rule. Covers wind correction, time/speed/distance, fuel planning, true airspeed, density altitude, crosswind components, and top of descent — all computed client-side with a live vector diagram.

item.title: Cirrus Vision Jet G3: Technical Analysis and Comparative Assessment
item.description: A comprehensive technical evaluation of the Cirrus Vision Jet G3, analyzing performance specifications, avionics upgrades, and operational improvements compared to G1, G2, and G2+ variants.
